title: Forgot Password
subtitle: Recover access to your account by verifying your email address.

emailStep.title: Verify Your Email
emailStep.description: Enter the email address associated with your account.

otpStep.title: Enter Verification Code
otpStep.description: We've sent a verification code to your email address.

passwordStep.title: Create New Password
passwordStep.description: Choose a strong password for your account.

messages.passwordReset: Your password has been reset successfully.
messages.invalidEmail: No account found with this email address.
messages.invalidToken: The reset session is invalid or expired.
messages.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.OTP_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: You have exceeded the maximum number of attempts to enter the verification code. Please request a new code.
errors.INVALID_PASSWORD: Password does not meet security requirements.
